It is&nbsp;important &amp; recommended to clean your AC filter once in 2 weeks to maintain good air quality and performance of AC. Cleaning frequency may differ depends upon usage and environmental condition. Self Filter Cleaning steps Filter removal and fixing method depends upon the LG AC model you have. Generally,&nbsp; Type1 filter type &nbsp; applied to split AC model&nbsp; purchased from 2019 onwards &nbsp; &amp;&nbsp; Type2 filter type &nbsp; applied to split AC&nbsp; purchased before 2019 &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp; Video Time Stamp Type 1 video: &nbsp;0 - 1.13 mins&nbsp;&nbsp; Type 2 Video:&nbsp; 1.13 - 3.22 mins Based on your AC type you may scroll up and view&nbsp; You can find information about remote features and functions of your AC — on the LG Inverter Split AC 2025 Model Remote Function and features"}
